name: view scope games played year offset range
description: Locks player_games_played + year_offset range registers per-game CTE and emits correlated SUM via the year_offset emitter, instead of dangling alias
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024,2025,2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('RB')), "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2024.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs_year_2024" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2"."rate_type_total_count" AS "games_played_0", (SELECT SUM(t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.rate_type_total_count) FROM t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2 WHERE t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.pid = player.pid AND t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.year BETWEEN player_years.year + 1 AND player_years.year + 9) AS "games_played_1", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2" on "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2"."year" = 2024 where player.pos IN ('RB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2"."rate_type_total_count", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
